allow: PowerShell($env:PATH -split ";" | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; echo "---"; where.exe flutter 2>&1; where.exe dart 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
